recent_player_actions.text: Galinor approaches one of the guardsmen. "Guard, where is your captain?"
Galinor steps away, immediately approaches one of the refugees. "You, stranger, have you heard any good rumors of late?"
Galinor returns to the same guard he originally approached. "What about you? I'm here to help the city, are you aware of any tasks that could use a hero?"

frontier_gate.last_player_action_text: Galinor returns to the same guard he originally approached. "What about you? I'm here to help the city, are you aware of any tasks that could use a hero?"

recent_contextual_leads.subject: galinor
recent_contextual_leads.position: at the cinderwatch gate, rain drenching the soot-dark stone

recent_contextual_leads.subject: guards, dressed in weathered uniforms, maintain a brittle discipline, casting wary eyes towards the masses
refugees, wagons, and foot traffic clog the muddy approach; guards hold the choke while the crowd presses in

topic:approach_captain_galinor.last_answer: galinor is at the cinderwatch gate, rain drenching the soot-dark stone.
topic:approach_captain_galinor.last_player_input: Galinor approaches one of the guardsmen. "Guard, where is your captain?"

topic:approach_away_galinor.last_answer: The guard looks at Galinor and says, "I can't say there's anything needing a 'hero' right now. Just keep an eye on the patrols; some have gone missing. Rumor has it they were last seen near the old trading crossroads, but details are murky." He shifts nervously, glancing over the crowd as if expecting something.
